message:
feat: add context pressure indicator to ThreadPanel headers

- Add pressureColor helper with 3-tier thresholds (success/warning/error)
- Compute contextPressure percentage from tokenUsage contextTokens/contextWindowSize
- Render compact pressure bar + percentage before token usage in header
- Wrap both in headerStats container with margin-left: auto
- Add CSS classes: headerStats, contextPressure, pressureBarTrack, pressureBarFill
- Move margin-left: auto from tokenUsage to headerStats
- Add 6 tests covering visibility, color thresholds, and wrapper structure
